content.en:
Boom Boom Boom !!

The monsters of the first-class supreme limit attacked Ye Tian frantically, but Ye Tian's defense was too powerful to kill Ye Tian at all.

In the blink of an eye, another half an hour passed.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's momentum changed, his eyes stared at the monster, and said, "It's time for me to attack you!"

Shout!

With just one sword, this first-class supreme extreme monster was instantly hit hard by Ye Tian, and the second knife slashed out, completely destroying it.

"If it was the first-class supreme limit with strong life-preserving ability, I wouldn't be able to kill it, but this monster is only strong in strength, average in defense, and even worse in life-preserving ability, so I can't stop my two moves!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And now, he was sure that he had broken the shackles of the first-class supreme limit and the one-star god general, because he had just felt that he had broken a layer of shackles.

However, although he is a one-star god general, he is the weakest one-star god general.

"Kill a ten-star peak earth venerable blood beast, one point!"

A nameless voice rang out.

"One point?"

Ye Tian didn't know what the use of this score was, but it definitely had something to do with the assessment results.

"Half an hour later, ten ten-star Earth Venerable Extreme Blood Beasts have descended, please prepare!"

The voice rang out again.

"Ten ten-star Earth Venerable Extreme Blood Beasts? This is equivalent to ten first-class supreme extreme blood beasts, and the deterrent power of ten heads together can far exceed that of a first-class supreme extreme blood beast. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, with his current one-star god general's combat strength, he should not be afraid, and he can kill them one by one with just a little effort.

Half an hour passed quickly.

Bang!!!!

One blood beast after another descended, and as soon as it appeared, Ye Tian's expression changed.

"The aura of each blood beast is stronger than the blood beast just now, and it is also a first-class supreme extreme, but these ten blood beasts are obviously closer to a one-star god general, and the ten blood beasts together are even comparable to the weaker one-star god generals!

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he was allowed to stabilize the combat power of a one-star god general, and then use some elixir to refine his body and soul, his strength would be able to increase again, and it would be much easier to kill these ten blood beasts at that time.

But now, he has just broken through and is in the weakest one-star god general's combat power, and this battle will not be easy.

But he has another advantage, and that is speed!

The constant light supernatural power was enough for him to dodge the attacks of the ten blood beasts, coupled with the powerful defense, given some time, he could still kill the ten blood beasts one by one.

"Slowly consume them!"

Ye Tian decided.

Then, the battle began!

Ye Tian completely dodged their attacks with his constant light divine power, attacking these ten blood beasts with one sword, a single blood beast was naturally not their opponent, but the ten blood beasts attacked together, and the attack was enough to resist his sword qi.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

A few hours later, one of the blood beasts that was being taken care of by Ye Tian was seriously injured, and the strength and speed of the attack were greatly reduced.

"Hunyuan Slash!"

Ye Tian slashed out this blow, although the Hunyuan Slash did not increase much from his current strength, it was also one of the strongest tricks.

Burst!

With a single slash, the blood beast was directly wiped out.

Ten blood beasts died, and it was much easier for Ye Tian to deal with the other blood beasts.

Then, the second blood beast fell!

The third head!

Fourth!

......

Another half an hour passed, and Ye Tian stood in the void, surrounded by the corpses of ten blood beasts.

"Kill ten ten-star peak earth venerable blood beasts, 3 points!"

"Half an hour later, a one-star god will descend on the peak blood beast, please prepare the examiners!"

The voice rang out.

"What, the one-star god will be the peak blood beast !!"

Ye Tian's expression changed.

The gap between the peak of the first-star god general and the one-star god general is very large, and he can't deal with a blood beast that is at the peak of the one-star god general!

"If you fail the assessment, you won't die, otherwise the original Yuntan Tianjun will definitely die!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Although he didn't know the strength of Yuntan Heavenly Monarch, he was only a one-star god general at most, and it was difficult to raise it to the level of a two-star god general without a strong inheritance.

Moreover, if the assessment causes death casually, then the meaning of the assessment is no longer there.

"Let's fight as hard as we can!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Half an hour passed, and a blood beast like a mountain appeared, and its aura was extremely terrifying.

"Fight!"

Ye Tian held a long knife and killed him.

He didn't want to win, he just wanted to fight.

Rumble!!!

The one-star god slapped the peak blood beast over, directly knocking Ye Tian out at once, the Hunyuan Domain and the space-time domain were directly broken, and the Chaos Origin Ancient Well was also directly broken.

The Chaos Origin Ancient Well is the manifestation of the Chaos Avenue Vision, and even if it is broken, it can be condensed again, but the Chaos Origin Ancient Well is Ye Tian's incomparably powerful defensive means, but it can only block the blow of the peak of the one-star god general.

If this one-star god attacked the peak blood beast again, Ye Tian would definitely be unable to stop it.

"Constant Light Magical Power!"

Ye Tian tried to avoid being attacked with his speed.

However, at this moment, this blood beast released infinite blood light, turning into a field, enveloping this area, and suppressing Ye Tian at once.

"If it's in the outside world, I can run, but this is the assessment area, the scope is not large, and I can't run!"

Ye Tian frowned.

If you can't run, you can only fight head-on.

In just a few moves, Ye Tian was hit hard.

He didn't use the talent of transferring damage to transfer the damage to the Death Flower Sea, because it was useless, the potential of the Death Flower Sea was still low, even if he was promoted to the Tianzun realm, it would not be of much use, and he couldn't resist the casual blow of the God General at all.

One breath!

Two breaths!

Three breaths!

Ye Tian has always insisted, but the gap in strength is too big to stop it at all!

Just as Ye Tian was dying of heavy injuries, the blood beast disappeared.

A ray of light shone down, and all of his injuries recovered.

"If you fail to defeat the one-star god general peak blood beast, the first round of assessment is over, and the second round of assessment begins!"

The sound descends.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

If he defeated the one-star god general peak blood beast, he would definitely be able to get a lot of points, and the assessment score would naturally be higher.

Wow!

The void transformed, and Ye Tian came to a temple hall.

Here, a mirror is suspended in mid-air.

"Stand in front of the Ten Thousand Void Mirror and test the potential!"

The voice rang out.

Ye Tian walked up and stood in front of the Ten Thousand Void Mirror.

A ray of light scanned Ye Tian, and soon a set of data appeared.

Examiner: Ye Tian

Physical Potential: 9 points

Soul Potential: 7 points

Talent potential: 10 points

Total: 26 points

"This data, the full score is 10 points, my natural potential is full score, but the physical potential is not full score, only 9 points, and the soul potential is only 7 points!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

At this time, the voice sounded again: "The second round of assessment is over, 26 points!"
